name: Wataru Hibiki
description:
ೃ❀࿔ 愛と驚きの表現者 + ̇𓈒

Let's have some fun this winter, Producer ☆

 𝃜   ೀ   ֺ    ⏝⏝   +    ༢

── .✦ Hi, it's been a while! Honestly, I thought I'd completely given up on everything, but as it turns out, I can suddenly force myself to do something. It's been quite a long journey, and yet here I am, having passed my exams and enrolled in the profession I dreamed of.

── .✦ In any case, I hope that everything will be fine with me, and I also hope that everything is with you too.

── .✦ V.1.1 :: released
